title: tragacantha jejuna
intro: Tragacantha jejuna, also known as Astragalus membranaceus, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha jejuna include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Tragacantha jejuna is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
